summary: Verified bug fix for credits not showing as payment option in OnDemandRequestDrawer. All features working correctly: credits fetch on drawer open, Surf Credits option visible with correct balance, Credit/Debit Card option always visible.
critical_code_review_comments: OnDemandRequestDrawer.js lines 128-152: Credits fetch logic working correctly with console.log debugging
OnDemandRequestDrawer.js lines 155-159: creditsFetched state reset on drawer close prevents stale data
OnDemandRequestDrawer.js lines 1121-1165: Payment method UI in crew_payment step correctly shows both options
OnDemandRequestDrawer.js lines 1231-1280: Payment method UI in confirm step correctly shows both options
credits.py line 140-154: GET /api/credits/balance/{user_id} endpoint returns correct balance
seed_data_creation: Made Test Pro photographer on-demand active with location (28.3667, -80.6067) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credits payment option bug is FIXED. Verified with seanstanhope (14.0625 credits) - OnDemandRequestDrawer correctly fetches credits on open, displays Surf Credits option with balance, and shows Credit/Debit Card as alternative. Console logs confirm: [OnDemandDrawer] Fetching credits, Credits response with balance, User has credits setting payment method to credits.

features_tested.credits_balance_api: PASS - GET /api/credits/balance/{user_id} returns correct balance (18.125 for davidsurf, 14.0625 for seanstanhope)
features_tested.credits_fetch_on_drawer_open: PASS - Console logs show [OnDemandDrawer] Fetching credits for user when drawer opens
features_tested.surf_credits_option_visible: PASS - Surf Credits option with Balance: $14.06 visible in both crew_payment and confirm steps
features_tested.card_option_visible: PASS - Credit/Debit Card option visible in both steps
features_tested.credits_auto_selected: PASS - When user has credits > 0, Surf Credits is auto-selected as payment method
